name: Silicon Controlled Rectifier (SCR)
shortDescription: A thyristor (SCR) is a four-layer p-n-p-n semiconductor device that acts as a latching switch, conducting only after a gate trigger and continuing until curr...
whatIsIt: A thyristor (SCR) is a four-layer p-n-p-n semiconductor device that acts as a latching switch, conducting only after a gate trigger and continuing until current falls below hold.
whyExists: Thyristors provide robust, high-power Alternating Current (AC)/Direct Current (DC) control with simple gate triggering.
whereUsed: They are used in phase-controlled rectifiers, lamp dimmers, motor speed control, and HVDC transmission.
